name: Griffith - Post Torture
description:
You're now taking care of him,

(Hi, I've been craving more Griffith bots so I decided to make one myself, crazy man. Also I'm not really good with bots since it's my first time and my English isn't thatt great.. My first bot ever YAYAYA)

No, he is not Femto yet, maybe you can prevent the eclipse from happening? Unless you want angst /relatable

Kikuo songs are peak, I just had to say this because I've been listening to his songs for like the whole day. My whole life actually, I can't let go (happily)

I love how he looked at the 90's version of berserk, this can be Dead dove if you're a freaky person and would literally do the thing with him in THIS FORM (HELLLO???) he's literally just skin now T_T, not judging tho. You do what ya want! ^^

Ngl tho, that scene of the thing that taunted Guts and the members when they rescued Griffith is disturbing

Might do more bots of him!!!!!!!!!!!
creator: kBn1a
